title: Neo Classic: Netherrack
description: A remake of the Classic Netherrack texture in the modern style, emulating the originally gross, fleshy feel.
body:
# Neo Classic
```
Neo Classic is a project meant to be a full texture update, as well as a reimagining of a lot of textures' original designs with a moderner look.
```

## Neo Classic: Netherrack (Formerly Fleshier Nether)

I'm personally a big fan of the original netherrack texture from alpha 1.2-1.12, and as such I've spent a while trying to adapt the design into the modern style. My design's based on the [texture update tests'](https://www.minecraft.net/content/dam/archive/e645cf9736a88a0f77a0b365363eacf9-version2screenshot1.jpg) old design and the classic netherrack. I also included a new glowstone and a small edit to soul sand.

## This is the result: 
![Netherrack and Nyliums](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90323df34f32e113f449b4de22065f3cafa2f6f8.png)


# 2.0 and beyond.

I plan to make the entire nether slightly impacted by the pack, to give it a similarly gnarly design. This pack will be part of my **Legacy Spritework Remade** collection, where I intend to make classic designs on more high-end pixel art. Mostly so fans of Programmer Art's designs can have that feel with modern mods that emulate the current artstyle.

I also plan to include mod support for nether affecting mods with custom netherrack variants, which I suggest you ask for in the discord.
